Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Andrew D. Winghart, Esq. of WINGHART LAW GROUP, INC., T:510.593.8546, for plaintiff, and moving party, on Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing held. Finding good cause, the Court ordered that:

ANDREW WINGHART, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS MARGARET SOMDAHL AND RICHARD SOMDAHL is granted.

Order signed in open court.
